name: Modern Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs, sugar, and salt slightly to mix.
2. Pour the scalded milk into the egg mixture.
3. Add vanilla (if desired), cooked rice, and raisins.
4. Place in a 1-quart casserole (6 1/2") and set in a pan of water (1 inch deep).
5. Sprinkle with nutmeg.
6. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes in a moderate oven (350 degrees) until a silver knife inserted into the custard comes out clean.
7. Turn off the heat. Serve warm with cream. Serves 6.
